name: LA-Z-BOY INC
business: We manufacture, market, import, export, distribute and retail upholstery furniture products under the La-Z-Boy , England, and Joybird tradenames. In addition, we import, distribute and retail accessories and casegoods (wood) furniture products under the Hammary and Joybird tradenames. We sell our products through multiple channels: directly to consumers through retail stores that we own and operate; to furniture retailers or distributors in the United States, Canada, and approximately 45 other countries, including the United Kingdom, China, Australia, and New Zealand; and through our websites, www.la-z-boy.com and www.joybird.com.

exposures.sentence: We manufacture, market, import, export, distribute and retail upholstery furniture products under the La-Z-Boy , England, and Joybird tradenames.
We also own Joybird, a leading omni-channel, direct to consumer retailer and manufacturer of upholstered furniture.
Significant disruptions in our supply chain could negatively affect our business and results of operations.

Factors influencing consumer spending include, among others, general economic conditions, consumer disposable income, recession and fears of recession, United States government default or shutdown or the risk of such default or shutdown, inflation, unemployment, war and fears of war, changes in global trade policies, availability of consumer credit, consumer debt levels, consumer confidence, conditions in the housing market, fuel prices, interest rates, sales tax rates, civil disturbances and terrorist activities, natural disasters, adverse weather, and health epidemics or pandemics.
During fiscal 2026, we started a multi-year distribution and home delivery transformation project intended to design and build an even more effective delivery network for our business.

We are driving change throughout our digital platforms to improve the user experience, with a specific focus on the ease with which customers browse through our broad product assortment, customize products to their liking, find stores to make a purchase, or purchase at www.la-z-boy.com.

catalysts.event: Open 9 to 12 new La-Z-Boy stores and relocate or remodel 30 to 35 stores in fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2027, the La-Z-Boy Store network further plans to open 9 to 12 stores and relocate or remodel 30 to 35 stores, all of which will feature our latest store designs.

catalysts.event: Open or update approximately 80 La-Z-Boy Comfort Studio locations and 30 branded space locations in fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: During fiscal 2027 we plan to open or update approximately 80 La-Z-Boy Comfort Studio locations and 30 branded space locations.

catalysts.event: Complete sale of the remaining portion of the Casegoods wholesale business in the first quarter of fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: During the first quarter of fiscal 2027, the Company completed the sale of the remaining portion of the Casegoods wholesale business recorded as held for sale as of April 25, 2026.
